mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.nickname AS writer FROM reply r JOIN member m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.post_no = #{postNo} AND r.post_board = #{postBoard} AND r.status = 'Y' ORDER BY r.create_date ASC

SELECT R.REPLY_NO, R.CONTENT, R.CREATE_DATE, R.MODIFY_DATE, R.STATUS, R.POST_BOARD, R.POST_NO, R.MEMBER_NO, M.NICKNAME AS WRITER FROM REPLY R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE R.POST_BOARD = 'T' AND R.POST_NO = #{postNo} AND R.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_NO, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, STATUS, POST_BOARD, POST_NO, MEMBER_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_RNO.NEXTVAL, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{postBoard}, #{postNo}, #{memberNo} )
